channel.title: /biz/ Active (filtered, with replies)
channel.description: Filtered out: general, gme, bbbyq. OP + first 3 replies + last 30 replies.

item.title: Why haven't you taken the passport bro/foreign wife pill? — 68 replies — 272.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
Why haven't you taken the passport bro/foreign wife pill?

Open thread • Replies: 68 • Updated: 2026-03-13 22:28 UTC

OP

Why haven't you taken the passport bro/foreign wife pill?

Just did my taxes MFJ and I got like an $8k refund, normally I pay.

Plus they are cuter and less bitchy than their western counterparts.

Early replies (first 3)

61976375
>>61976281
im tempted for the easymode but cba living in SEA

61976386
I want a cute, loving Nigerian bf who will make me jollof rice, bros...

61976398
>>61976281
>Why haven't you taken the passport bro/foreign wife pill?
I have dignity

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61977896
>>61977870
Getting a girlfriend in 2026 is not easy and if you think it is you either date fatties or have some obvious advantage (tall, conventionally attractive, etc)
You said it yourself
>degenerate sluts

61977901
>>61976281
kek if she was born in a western country she wouldnt even look at him
why did kikes do this to society?

61977937
>>61976386
There are plenty of jollof eating link fudders here

61977942
Idk I'm out in Thailand right now and in respect to dating I don't think it's the land of milk and honey it's portrayed to be. It's probably because I have zero game and confidence but it's like the abundance of hookers has made it so that it's difficult to form a shorter term relationship. It seems like it's either bang a hooker or form a long term relationship, very little in-between. Dating apps are inundated with prostitutes, and the type of girls that get into that line of work aren't necessarily the type you'd expect. Lots of them are pretty and educated and dress quite modestly. The west seems to be an anomaly with regard to the types of relationships there are, it's more pragmatic here.

For the record, yes, I have banged a couple of hookers. If your mind is set on the Asian wife thing I'm sure you could make that happen, there's tons of westerners with Thai women out here. However, if you think you're going to rock up and be treated like a rockstar just by virtue of being from the west, you're in for a rude awakening.

61977947
>>61976726
You lead with this:
>I already have taken the tight asian pussy pill.
and then advise this:
>Fuck white women.
??? Very contradicktory.

61977950
>>61977942
>It seems like it's either bang a hooker or form a long term relationship, very little in-between.
Give it a chance, dude. I got nowhere there until one day a literal airline stewardess started hitting on me outside a mall. I don't mean one of those hookers in a stewardess uniform that some of those brothels employ, I mean a genuine flys-around-all-over-the-world chick with a stable job and big tiddies.

They are out there and they love Western men.

61977978
>>61977950
Yeah I guess I should. Relationships are confusing, while seeing a hooker is straightforward. Happy it worked out for you though

61977985
>>61977950
what happened after that ?

61978070
>>61976281
Racemixing is gross.
I would hate myself if I had good children instead of the perfect White children I have with my White wife.

61978072
>>61976281
Because 3rd world women are ugly niggers and desu i don't even consider them humans id rather stay alone and bang whores when i want to.
If you seriously want to get in a romantic relationship with a 3rd world clay-soul nigger that probably means you're a dysgenic low-t faggot and your disgusting offsprings will get naturally selected

61978073
>>61976726
>Fuck White women
You don't, that's the issue.
If White women were attracted to you, you wouldn't settle for chinks.

61978075
Thinking about being a passport bro in the Middle East

61978077
>>61976375
I did and it's one of the best decisions I've made. I quit working 9 months ago to live in Bangkok with my gf. I've got enough cash/assets saved up to live like this for 30 years and I trade options for fun side income. I still have my house in America but I'm considering selling it and never moving back.
>>61977942
>However, if you think you're going to rock up and be treated like a rockstar just by virtue of being from the west, you're in for a rude awakening.
This is the truth. Any loser can come out here and get love-bombed by a chubby, brown Thai bar girl that will "date" any Westerner (or East Asian) that feeds them money or gifts. I've noticed it a lot both with attractive and ugly dudes out here. Hard mode is finding a cute educated, fair-skinned, child-less lady that's only looking for love.

61978084
Its so funny I bet half of the people who are against it are capitalist who are for shipping jobs overseas because its cheaper. But no you can't fuck some random girls there because you just can't its wrong

61978883
>>61977895
like I said, saying they’re hard to get and saying you don’t want one are two different things. I’m only disagreeing that they’re hard to get.
>>61977896
>degenerate sluts
>hard to get
pick only one

61978888
>>61978075
I heard it’s legal to have four wives in some countries. wild stuff.

61979160
>>61978084
>money needs to be evenly distributed
>but girls which are way more important not
Retarded leftists.

61980134
>>61978070
How perfect of a white wife? Been looking for one but still haven't found any virgins

61980180
>>61976281
Because I don't want to have mixed race hapa mutt children like Elliot Rodgers

61980666
>>61976763
I think it's a crime nobody leaves a "kek" at least but there is so much captcha fatigue these days it's hard doing captchas like a little money in a lab just to post a honest reaction tht I actually chuckled proggresively a bit a I was reading and the punchline landed perfectly

61981117
>>61980180
I agree with you, but white women have shown they have no ability to think long term unlike asian women.

If you wanna get half your assets ripped from you go ahead.

61981276
>>61980666
Have a lovely day anon. Wagmi.

61981410
just fuck latinas in the us. its like being a passport bro without having to live in the third world. they are not picky at all

61981579
>>61976281
All the good looking women who would make great wives and mothers are taken in high school and college the latest. Whatever remains is taken shortly after they enter the workforce. There exist very few good looking (7 and above) women that are single and have a good heart, are modest, raised in a decent family, soft spoken and pretty. The window of opportunity when they are single is very very narrow. These are the 2% of women, the highest stock of females this wonderful creation can offer. If you don't frequent their circles or the events they attend you have no chance of meeting them. Women also don't go anywhere alone, so whatever hobbies women have or events they attend it is done with their husband or boyfriend and if they are single with their groups of friends.

tldr; there simply aren't enough single good looking young white women to go around for everybody, they are rare and exist mostly in very niche places where men without social circles (loners) can't get in to

61981592
asian cant love.

61981695
>>61976281
Nigga I'm in Latvia with my 12 years younger wife and our kids. Passport dads just keep winning exponentially greater victories.

61981704
>>61981410
US is the third world... unless you're the 1%

61981705
>>61976509
Like 100 million foreigners have immigrated to the USA since 1945 and you can't handle the paperwork?

61981724
>>61976281
I am Anglo Saxon. My wife is Anglo Saxon. My son looks like me.

item.title: Polkadot - First halving — 53 replies — 212.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
Polkadot - First halving

Open thread • Replies: 53 • Updated: 2026-03-13 22:19 UTC

OP

https://polkadothalving.com/ 10 more days. https://www.parity.io/blog/refining-polkadots-economic-architecture-issuance-DOT-DAP-and-network-adjustments
https://x.com/Polkadot/status/2028482336463945765
"
Polkadot’s economic upgrade begins rolling out in 10 days.

Enhanced tokenomics increases DOT scarcity and introduces new governance and staking mechanisms.

▸ DOT supply capped at 2.1B
▸ Emissions cut 53.6%
▸ Unbonding from 28 days to 24-48 hours
"

Early replies (first 3)

61933757
Guys?

61933779
>>61932834
10000$ @ 6.5
i dont sell my dotty

61936705
Guys?

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61956435
https://polkadothalving.com/ 4 more days

61959501
100$ end of bull run

61960135
>>61956435
>>61959501

All the oilfags and metalfags are missing easy money here

61962610
https://polkadothalving.com/ 3 more days

61962631
>>61942667
I did some research and boughted, fren

61962633
>>61962631
Oh? What convinced you?

61962637
>>61962631
Also, 1 recommendation. Stake on Bifrost or Hydration. Or through the official staking dashboard https://staking.polkadot.cloud/#/overview. Don't use exchanges, they give you peanuts.

61962645
https://x.com/21shares_us/status/2031028768001704295
"
$TDOT is the first-ever @Polkadot
ETP in the US, now live and #NasdaqListed.
"

https://x.com/Polkadot/status/2031281093635129822
"
It’s official.
The first Polkadot U.S. ETF is live and trading on Nasdaq.
"

picrel

61962682
>>61962633
DOT IS GOING TO THE MOON

61962686
https://www.21shares.com/en-us/products-us/tdot 11.3m$ of inflows in the first day. They're also considering staking at some point.

>>61962682
You earlier said "I did some research and boughted". What were your findings? What convinced you?

61962688
>>61962682
>DOT IS GOING TO THE MOON
100$ end of bull run

61962693
https://ng.investing.com/etfs/tdot-nasdaq

61962715
i dont sell, i dont care

61962726
>>61962715
>i dont sell, i dont care
I DOT buy, I DOT care

61965530
DOT? That thing is put into my brakes?

61966637
back to $1?

61968186
>>61966637
>I DOT buy, I DOT care
>i don't sell, i don't care

61968274
This crypto is 1.50.
The fuck?

Not a stock!

61971016
https://polkadothalving.com/ 2 more days

61971138
Prepare yourselves guys. A once in a lifetime event is about to happen. The millennial lunar eclipse is about to happen.

61972032
>>61971138
Locked and loaded fellow DOThead

61972844
>>61932834
This is the pedochain and the total ruin of investors. This crap is just going to go lower, all the way to zero.

61975396
https://x.com/Polkadot/status/2031796064085242150
"
Ongoing economic upgrade for Polkadot introduces DOT scarcity in 3 days.

The first Polkadot Halving will deliver a daily reduction of issuance by 53%:
• Maximum supply: 2.1B DOT
• Reduced long-term inflation
• A more predictable monetary model
"

I just hope you guys understand that even though the inflation is dropping that this WILL NOT have an immediate effect. Stuff takes time. If you believe that the price will sky rocket after the inflation drop then you're in for a disappointing experience.

61976472
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=9jK-NcRmVcw
https://polkadothalving.com/ 1 more day

61976836
>>61975396
Maybe you should have mentioned this beforehand

61977306
staking like 650 dot on kraken

61978116
>>61976836
Mentioned what?

>>61977306
>staking like 650 dot on kraken
Do it on Hydration or Bifrost. You get peanuts on Kraken compared to those 2. Also, you'll be supporting the coin itself by doing this. Or at least use the official staking dashboard

Bifrost
https://app.bifrost.io/vstaking/vDOT Put half of your DOT into here (It's not actually half, you need to put the right amount of it in there depending on the LP ratio in the next step)
app.bifrost.io/swap/pool/stable/DOT_vDOT?type=add Then put DOT and vDOT in the LP
https://app.bifrost.io/farming?network=polkadot Then put it into the farm

Hydration
https://app.hydration.net/strategies Or use GDOT. This gets you less than Bifrost

Official staking dashboard
https://staking.polkadot.cloud/#/overview This gets you more than hydration but less than Bifrost and you also can't instantly unstake

61980116
https://polkadothalving.com/ 6h 40min

61981693
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=9jK-NcRmVcw
https://polkadothalving.com/ 1h 40min

item.title: GET THE FUCK OUTTA MY WAY NIGGA — 13 replies — 52.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
GET THE FUCK OUTTA MY WAY NIGGA

Open thread • Replies: 13 • Updated: 2026-03-13 22:23 UTC

OP

N

If I am walking and a nigger is blocking my way, I say "will you not yield?" If the answer is "no", then I say, "if I yield to you today, will you yield at our next encounter" (making them hold to their word or no). If the answer is no, then I say, "then prepare for combat". Amazing how they back off when you say Templar shit like that. I've only had to wreck two of five in such circumstances. One was a joke. The other punched and grazed my cheek. Then I feinted to the head, did the liver punch, and the muay thai grasp and knee to the nose. Didn't knock the fucker out, but he got up and walked the fuck away.

Early replies (first 3)

61977604
>>61976901
SSSHHHHHH!

61979092
N

61979108
>>61979092
I

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61979396
G

61979575
G

61979596
for 4 years i have done nothing but 70% eth and 30% qqq bi weekly with all my spare change from my paycheck

61979598
cant this pos sustain a single fucking pump in a year

61979946
zoom out

61981436
>>61979946
no need to announce you're leaving

61981446
>>61979946
>Zoom out
>It's insanely bullish
>"Nooo, noo you don't understand there's an unfilled gap at 0.07 cent that has to be filled!!!"
-Bobo

61981646
If nothing else, the aesthetic of this new "mandate" doc the Ethereum Foundation put out today is fire.

61981651
>>61981646
>is fire.
You need to go back.

61981711
>>61981651
Shan't.

item.title: TOTAL. WAGIE. DEATH. — 13 replies — 52.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
TOTAL. WAGIE. DEATH.

Open thread • Replies: 13 • Updated: 2026-03-13 22:20 UTC

OP

Step 1. You take out a loan
Step 2. You pay it back

It's really that simple.

Early replies (first 3)

61977668
how do I long homelessness lol

61977694
an unemployed 17 year old with bad credit and no cosigner can borrow up to $12,500 from the feds for their first year of college. Try borrowing $12,500 unsecured with no income and bad credit.
your 2 step is disingenuous because in reality it's
step 1 you apply for a loan
step 2 you get approved/denied for a loan
step 3 you pay it back
but the government is happy to do you a favor and give you a loan you can't be denied for and follows you through bankruptcy.

61977696
>>61977648
Why can't people take accountability for their actions?

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61977701
Step 1 graduate early.
Step 2 sign pell at 17
Step 3 nobody checks age
Step 4 you made a minor sign a contract?

61977765
>>61977696
Based goycattlenigger.
You're right, fuck those young white men with student loans.
But shaniquas? And her seven kids? We need to support them because it's good for society.
Israel getting an 8 billion dollar aid package for existing? C'mon we like Jews.

61977792
>>61977765
Not my fault pedophile kikes don't age verify.
No sweat

61977914
>>61977694
Step 1 is contingent on the notion that the loan was already approved. If you weren't approved for the loan, you can't subsequently take it out. For example, when you take out the trash, it already implies that the perquisites are fulfilled by the trash can being full. Would you take out the trash if the trash can wasn't full? No, you wouldn't. Second off, your High School level explanation about the process of Step 1 and Step 2 is further diluting the entire conversation by adding nonsensical fluff to entertain the idea that you perceive yourself as smart. By trying to over explain a simple process, you're adding too much information so that it prevents those instructions from being perceived correctly. When a bullet is fired from the barrel of a rifle, the implication is that the bullet was already loaded in the chamber and the rifle was fully cocked.

61977918
>>61977694
on another note I forgot to add, if you plan on taking a girl out on a date. How would you do so if you didn't have a previous agreement from both parties involved? Amerimutt education is really something.

61978929
>>61977696
Frist make jews and "education" mafia take accountability of duping young and stupid people.

61981659
>>61977696
why can't corpos or the feds take accountability for their actions?

61981684
Kek americans continue to suffer.

61981688
>>61977694
i have 800+ credit and cant even get over 12k between two cards

61981699
>>61977648
How come the people who took out those COVID loans got forgiven?

item.title: 27 VIX edition >Please leave your political posts at the door unless they involve Business or Finance. — 357 replies — 243.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
27 VIX edition >Please leave your political posts at the door unless they involve Business or Finance.

Open thread • Replies: 357 • Updated: 2026-03-13 21:04 UTC

OP

27 VIX edition

>Please leave your political posts at the door unless they involve Business or Finance.

>Educational sites:
https://www.investopedia.com
https://www.khanacademy.org/economics-finance-domain

>Financial TV Streams:
https://www.newslive.com/american/cnbc.html
https://www.livestreamy.net/bloomberg/

>Charts:
https://www.tradingview.com
https://www.finscreener.com
https://www.portfoliovisualizer.com

>Screeners: so you feel like in the movies
https://finviz.com/
https://etfdb.com/

>Gambling:
https://www.optionsplaybook.com/options-introduction/
https://www.optionsprofitcalculator.com
https://optionstrat.com/
https://www.optionistics.com/quotes/option-prices

>Pre-Market and Live data:
https://www.investing.com/indices/indices-futures
https://finance.yahoo.com/

>Calendars
https://www.marketwatch.com/economy-politics/calendar
https://www.earningswhispers.com/calendar
https://www.cmegroup.com/trading/interest-rates/countdown-to-fomc.html
https://www.mortgagenewsdaily.com/data/building-permits

>Boomer Investing 101: so zoomers with meme stocks can outperform you
https://www.bogleheads.org/wiki/Getting_started
https://www.sec.gov/search-filings

>Misc smg:
https://www.financialjuice.com/home
https://finance.yahoo.com/trending-tickers
https://market24hclock.com/
https://www.dividendchannel.com/drip-returns-calculator
https://brokerchooser.com/
https://www.chathamfinancial.com/technology/us-market-rates

previously on /smg/
>>61979958

Early replies (first 3)

61980684
market will rally, oil will sell into the close, theres no debating this

61980685
oilads our next move?

61980687
I'm thinking about 650 3/20 SPY PUTS
waht do the best traders (you) in the world think?

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61981342
>>61981332
>You sounds like another retard.
I can at least manifest my thoughts into English kiddo.

61981344
totally normal activity going on in the world of oil the last few minutes

61981345
I bought some oil stocks, nothing crazy. i have another 100 I want to throw on somthing, what should i do?

61981346
>>61981334
based retard

61981347
>>61981195
I think they are paper shorting oil but there are serious localized oil shocks where oil is trading around $125-150/barrel

61981349
>>61981342
>Im too stupid to articulate my point
Okay kike.

61981351
>>61981345
oil/gas futures

61981352
>>61981284
damn.. I was hoping for one last dip before I go all in on oil but this is making me think it's only going up from now on

61981354
>>61981334
the jig is up, he's in the know

61981357
>>61981294
Reverse contango, backwardation

61981358
>>61981349
I'm afraid I have a rule about not arguing with spastics.
You will learn in your own time.

61981362
someone bake a real thread with a real subject
or else

61981363
>>61981352
It will go up as long as hormuz is closed but that doesn't mean it won't be volatile. Imagine a line that goes up and to the right on average but the actual price dances around it. That's sentiment.
That's also what the stock market looks like if you zoom out. The line that goes steadily up and to the right is earnings increases and dividend yield, while the line going up and down around it is sentiment (the P/E ratio).

61981370
>>61981284
so you are saying the market is gonna break on monday and oil will squeezerino and stocks will crasherino??

61981371
>>61981362
What are you going to short crude again?

61981374
>>61981058
howd you get up to 300k so fast what options did you buy for htat first run? also why did you get so greedy after making more money than any anon here has seen in their life

61981376
>>61981362
only shills bake, and they're off work now

61981377
>>61981358
You have a rule about being a proud inbred Jew.

61981379
>$99

61981382
>>61981284
ok if i put my serious hat on, i think you are looking at it the wrong way
people need oil here and now and today, so they will get ripped off and at the loss to keep things moving
the futures themselves are exactly what their name implies: betting on the future, so instead of thinking the blue line needs to catch up to the white, its actually the white line that will move back towards the blue

61981383
>>61981116
you know this is actaully kike mind programming to implant normality into the goyim subconscious right? this is literally how kikes manipulate us so easily

61981385
>>61981377
Thank you for confirming your spastication. You can carry on arguing with yourself now.

61981387
>>61981379
Close $100+?

61981393
>>61981195
naked shorting paper contracts printed up out of thin air

61981400
>>61981284

61981401
Two more weeks

61981405
>>61981284
If you nibbas would be as shizo towards silver as you would be to oil man...

61981406
>>61981400
>Likely driven by geopolitical factors
Lmao

61981411
>>61981362
>>61981409
>>61981409
>>61981409

61981416
>>61981401
its pretty likely the market pukes on monday, todays action was really nasty

item.title: ITT: We pretend we’re zoomers >why does every job want “experience” for entry level >I applied twice the market is cooke… — 52 replies — 121.7/hr
item.content:encoded:
ITT: We pretend we’re zoomers >why does every job want “experience” for entry level >I applied twice the market is cooke…

Open thread • Replies: 52 • Updated: 2026-03-13 22:07 UTC

OP

ITT: We pretend we’re zoomers

>why does every job want “experience” for entry level
>I applied twice the market is cooked
>budgeting is basically poverty mindset
>my boss asked me to come in before noon
>why should I save if housing is unfair
>trades are scary I’m more of an ideas person
>I deserve six figures for surviving the economy
>compounding takes too long I need results now
>retirement is a scam I plan to go viral
>someone fix the system I’m exhausted

Early replies (first 3)

61960323
>NOOO i got drafted by Trumpstein

61960451
I’d rather pretend I’m a Millennial
>OMG guys it’s exactly like ‘08
>you know 40 is the new 30
>Im only 35! 35 is young!!!
>Fucking boomers won’t retire en mass, fucking assholes!
>my cat is a heckin CHONKER
>No I don’t want kids my doggo is enough
>we need taxes causes roads dude
>I hate roads and cars I wished the US was like Europe!
>I can’t buy a house because boomers refuse to sell to me at what I can afford

61960546
>>61960451
Bootyblasted zoomer detected

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61970056
im a zoomer its like this

>Gegg all the people older than me are retards
>Geg its all falling apart soon we can rebuild the new world from the ashes
>>61960109
>>61960323
>>61960451
>>61960546

61970061
Christian Anarchism - No King But Christ

61970084
>>61960451
SHUT UP

61970115
>>61970084
board full of millenials not only going poor from bitstein crashing to 0, but crashing out in response to obvious bait

61970178
>>61970115
It is zoomers that are heavily into crypto because they cannot afford homes.

61970182
>>61960451
Yes.

61970213
>>61960451
lmao at the replies, millenials are truly the weakest generation

61970273
>>61970213
That sounds more like zoomers. Cuck.

61970290
>>61970178
millenials on suicide watch cause they sold crypto just before it mooned

61970333
>>61970290
Wtf are u talking about? It was well known that it was zoomers that were heavily into crypto because they cannot buy homes and cannot get good jobs.

61970366
>>61962410
kill yourself
immediately

61970404
>>61970366
He is a redditor kek

61970508
>>61960451
Kek

61970590
>>61970508
How is that funny

61970612
>>61967948
That's because their field is centered around memorization.

61970737
>>61970590
>>OMG guys it’s exactly like ‘08
>>No I don’t want kids my doggo is enough
I have seen these two IRL unironically. The funniest one is the former because millenials are the only people who romanticize a time period AFTER a recession.

61970759
>>61960109
K

61974713
>There are people over the age of 30 still using this site

61974744
>>61974713
I’m 33 and it literally feels like last week I was 20. It’ll happen to you too. One day you’re eating avocado toast and the next you’re in your 30’s.

61974769
>>61974713
I’m 41 and a father to three children
Also a finance nigga

61974851
>>61970056
>we

lol you're not building anything because you're a soft dork

get real you weenie

61974868
>>61974744
Same nigga and I’m also 41
Sheeit nigga the last 20 years was like a flash in the pan. Life goes fast and the messed up thing is that the older you get the faster it seems to pass by.

61974971
>>61974713
I've been on 4chan since I was 11 years old. The days when you could be banned for being underaged. you really never leave this place, no matter what. You might take long breaks, but this place still lures you back here and there.
There are still good discussions on here where you'd be hard pressed to find them anywhere else on the web.

61975092
>>61960451
>*Crack*
>*Sip*
>How's the retro cheevo hunting going Bill?
>Yup, I'm catching on old games. Say, ya ever play Advance Wars Days of Ruin?
>No, what is it?
>Kino I missed out on
>What ya playing on?
>Emu deck, easy to afford without a wife and kids
>Heh, don't remind me

t. 34yr old boomer

61975124
>>61960109
>Yo unc that's trash form no cap for fr, bussin ain't got you, know I'm sayin n sheeeeeeet?
>No? Oh alright then

61977571
>>61962532
Nig
Ger.
I've applied to over a hundred jobs. I got called back 5 times, I've been sent about 8 rejection letters, and I've only made it to an in person interview twice. ONE WAS AT MCDONALDS WHICH I GOT GHOSTED WHEN THEY WANTED TO RESCHEDULE.
I'm fucked, but also I'm about to be cut off foodstamps. So in 2 months I'll just starve to death and it'll all be fine :D

61978051
>>61974971
this site is dying though so not everybody is returning

61979294
>>61977571
Where are you located?

61981608
>>61977571
Go to your local salvation army office (not their thrift stores). They hand out free food.
Was gibsmaxxing back during the china virus.

61981649
>>61960546
>>61963472
>>61969084
Don’t act like this. Hating on the younger generation is the ultimate boomerfication.

They are getting an even worse deal than we had and shouldn’t be shat on.

item.title: Today someone said he makes $125k a year and then another person said >what do you do to make $125k >that is a lot >are… — 235 replies — 98.2/hr
item.content:encoded:
Today someone said he makes $125k a year and then another person said >what do you do to make $125k >that is a lot >are…

Open thread • Replies: 235 • Updated: 2026-03-13 20:09 UTC

OP

Today someone said he makes $125k a year and then another person said
>what do you do to make $125k
>that is a lot
>are you in LA?
>why are you lying?
Then I said
>150k is middle class
>no offense, when others don’t believe others, it means they are poor or make less
Then he replied
>150k is not middle class
>60k-80k is middle class
I said
>$125k cannot afford a middle class lifestyle and most jobs paying $125k are in big cities and there is high cost of living
Then he starts lying and saying he is 13
The conversation is just him seething someone makes $125k and arguing that 150k is not middle class.
I tell him due to increased cost of living and wealth gap, even 1m is nothing and 10% of 50% of the consumption and 90% are not doing well.
Why are poor people always seething?
$125k isn’t even middle class. How poor do you guys that guy is? 40k? 70k?
He was really defensive about $150k being middle class.
Do poor people think they are middle class?
This isn’t the first time this has happened.

Early replies (first 3)

61965995
>>61965964
Middle class is self sufficient, it requires an income that can support a household, retirement, children, education(including college), stay at home wife (or) nanny, 2+ modern cars, insurance, 1-3 vacations/yr . I would say 125k-250k depending on area. Lower class normies think they are middle class, middle class is mostly dead. Upper class has excess income after meeting those needs. Lower class requires gov assistance(welfare, healthcare, public school, etc).

61966005
>>61965964
>>$125k cannot afford a middle class lifestyle and most jobs paying $125k are in big cities and there is high cost of living
When people ssay middle class they mean they've got a wife and together they make about 140k or something and can easily afford a suburban house in areas within 2 hours of major cities, especially in southern and midwestern cities like Omaha and Dallas. Your idea of middle class is jetsetting around and banging sloots whenever you want.

61966016
>>61965995
> 1-3 vacations/yr .
1 vacation, maybe dude.
3? Lmao.
I think middle class lifestyle now requires a lot higher income than what people think now.
That wasn’t the first time someone got really defensive with “no, 60-80k is middle class.”
Fucking annoying but good conversation I guess. The ignorance is annoying.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61972864
>>61972856
>Kill yourself kike
I voted for this

61973005
>>61965995
By that definition I'm upper class. But doesn't feel like it.

61974567
>>61965964
I love reading these mercantilist disputes between Ameripoors.
>$150k is middle class!!!1!!1
>no you fucking subhuman nigger, for $150k you cannot even afford an apartment in a big city
>it's fault of jews/trump/biden/obama/mexicans
>$300k is middle class, not $150k!!!!!11!

What really matters, is how much you can save. There's a person who earns $50k but lives with his parents and saves up $40k yearly. And there is a person who earns $100k but throws out his money on everything and barely saves up $10k. And who's the winner here? Work smart, not hard.

61974600
>>61974567
Not really. Don’t give me that bullshit about someone saving 1k is more well off than someone with 150k income.
Dumb ass.
>>61973005
>excess income
You are supposed to afford those things comfortably.

61974633
>>61974567
> What really matters, is how much you can save. There's a person who earns $50k but lives with his parents and saves up $40k yearly. And there is a person who earns $100k but throws out his money on everything and barely saves up $10k. And who's the winner here? Work smart, not hard.
You’re the retarded earning 50k huh lol

61974733
>>61974600
I'm doing it quite comfortably. I have next to no expenses. I save around 80% of my income.

61974774
>>61974733
You missed the point of the op.
Making 150k vs 50k. Ignoring other dumb shit idiot anons like you pull out your ass.

61974793
>>61974774
I'm not gonna say how much I earn, but you are right, I'm a dumb retard. GN anon.

61975034
>>61974793
I don’t need to know anything specific bro.
If you need a job, then its usually less than 400k.

61975068
>>61975034
Close enough, consulting.

61975234
>>61975068
Yeah. Most jobs cap out. Not sure why you were so defensive. My main topic was 50k and 150k.
I was talking to some consulting guy in nyc and I told him I used to make 200k and now retired. And he got so angry and triggered.
>you do NOT make 200k!!!!!
And he said he works for high networth people. But if he did, why was 200k so surprising
(it is because most income caps out and out of the general population, 200k is rarer).
Thing is, most rich people know whats possible so to see him so defensive, he was probably busting his ass for his work.
One thing I learned is well off people always believe others.
Poor people almost always immediately reply with
>no you dont
>yeah and im elon musk
>ur lying

61975263
"Class" is a Marxist term designed to make you hate people richer than yourself.

The terminology falls apart with any examination. For example, a doctor making $500K per year is "working class" because he works, but is in the top 1% of incomes.

If you want to communicate properly, just say high income, middle income, low income, etc.

61975270
>>61975263
A doctor IS working class.
There is working class and capitalist class.

61975379
>>61975270
But a person earning $30K a year can put $3k into a dividend stock and start collecting "surplus value" which Marxists decry as capitalist theft. Is he a working class or capitalist class? What about a worker who slowly invests over 40 years until his dividends pay more than his wage, but he's still working?
The terminology fails hard to communicate anything useful.

61975502
>>61965995
If you can afford a nanny and three vacations a year you are upper class full stop. Most normies get two weeks a year tops, with some uncs capping out at four.

61975528
>>61975379
Posts like yours dont really promote discussion and just shit flinging.
You KNOW what capitalist class and working class is. Why you talking nonsense?
> What about a worker who slowly invests over 40 years until his dividends pay more than his wage, but he's still working?
Obviously after that, then you can start talking about the lifestyle his dividends can bring in.

61975585
>>61975379
Marxists are ugly losers.

61975620
>>61975502
3 vacations. Yeah. Like over a month vacation kek. Normal bottom 90% or even 95% cannot afford this.
And they face high gas prices, air tickets price increases and food inflation due to Iran War lmaoo

61976191
>>61965964
60-80k was middle class before covid. Now it's working poor.

61976253
>>61975263
Retard, class comes from ancient Rome.

61976584
>>61965995
>support a household
>retirement safe
>3 kids
>education & college done, kids will go there too
>insurance
>5 holidays a year
one car only and missing a stay at home wife since we both work
still have excess money.
all this on 50k a year while she makes 40k.
god i love being a euro"poor" lmao

61976633
>>61976584
>5 holidays a year
Lol. Doubt. Unless theyre cheap.
Size of house? Neighborhood? City?
Cost of living in city? What car?

61976651
>>61976584
Or maybe vacations are not overseas. Like flying across the ocean.

61976676
>>61976584
American properties are expensive if on valuable land. So is Europe if you live somewhere desirable.

61976695
>>61976633
>>61976651
>>61976676
attic, basement, 3 bedrooms, kitchen/bathroom/living room and a study room.
yard about the size of the house, wife grows plenty of stuff there for the fun of it and it does save some grocery bills in the end.
car isnt fancy, just a volvo XC60, the city is båstad you can look it up if you want, its 100% white.

but yeah paid sick leave too, union is strong here and my salary have yearly assured raises, life looking good.

61976707
>>61976695
Not bad. Very middle class.
100% white. So…is it vhcol or mcol?

61976727
>>61976695
Based my man.

I recently moved into the german Eifel, roughly 690m2 property with 180m2 living space. House is about done, had to deal with shitty Internet Connection but Starlink rules. It's considerable "cheap" to build here because nobody wants to live on the countryside but countryside only means a 20 minute trip with the nearest train in a European country

Expecting our first kid in august so it will get lively in here. All of this on a 55k home-office job and her working in a close-by cosmetic surgery clinic. Maybe I can take the little one to his first trip to Ibiza somewhat next year, maybe 2 or 3 weeks at once - holiday planning is relaxed but if necessary I'm just gonna take some of that paid sick-leave right before my vacation - lol.

What are they gonna do? Can't fire me - kek.

61981065
itt: many people who don't understand household income and personal income. it's usually calculated per household because usually couples live together and both work.
middle class:
low end household income: 55k
high end: 165k
median: 85k

in california: low end 67k, high end 200k, median 100k.


https://finance.yahoo.com/news/much-money-makes-middle-class-120845381.html

61981175
>>61981065
The entire thread was an argument on whether 60k is middle class or not. Your post just confirmed 60k is middle class. lol.

61981181
>>61981065
Also, America median household income is 60k. 60k to 80k is also fine as a range.

item.title: Chainlink explicitly mentioned by SWIFT — 145 replies — 68.1/hr
item.content:encoded:
Chainlink explicitly mentioned by SWIFT

Open thread • Replies: 145 • Updated: 2026-03-13 20:25 UTC

OP

You may all sperg the fuck out now. Never fucking selling.

Early replies (first 3)

61964214
>ZOG Swift intern casually poops LLM-generated report
>CHAINCHINK IS BOOMING BROS
actually delusional. $9.

61964222
don't care don't care
price price price
you lost the game, stinkies
PERIOD
stop trying to reclaim some shred of lost dignity. just take the heckin' L

61964252
>>61964222
i dont really give a fuck about link but this image disgusts me

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61978702
>>61978690
Exactly my point.
The anon I replied to said the price is low because Chainlink isn't "allowing" the token to accrue value.
By his logic, Chainlink did allow it to accrue value in 2018 through 2020.

61978751
>>61978702
what the fuck are you talking about? LINK pumped on pure speculation, CLL had nothing to do with that
what anon is saying is that right now CLL has zero incentive to pursue another speculative pump, and thats what he meant with "allowed by CLL"
are you mentally handicapped?

61978761
>>61978751
>LINK pumped on pure speculation, CLL had nothing to do with that
That's exactly my point. Anon said Link isn't pumping because Chainlink isn't allowing it, which is obviously bullshit.

61978793
>>61978761
yes, and by "allowing" he meant "incentivised" to pump it any further

61978855
>>61978793
He said allow, not incentivise.

But since you changed the argument, how did CLL incensivise Link to keep pumping for two years in 208-2020?

61978869
>>61978455
>so according to you, Chainlink "exited" in 2020?
Yes.
>>61978486
>most people here bought under $0.50
No, most people here are top buyers.

61978889
>>61978855
who told you that you can win any argument by being pendantic?
>how did CLL incensivise Link to keep pumping
they didn't, people speculated
again, anon is simply stating that currently CLL has zero incentive to pump it any further

61978933
>>61978869
Then why are you "all in Link" today?

>>61978889
>they didn't, people speculated
Exactly.
Chainlink "allowing" or even "incentivising" it has nothing to do with anything.

61978976
>>61978933
>Chainlink has nothing to do with LINK
I can't decide whether you're a genuine retard or the worst troll of all time

61978998
>>61978976
maybe you should read your own posts lol
>>61978751
>CLL had nothing to do with that

61979002
>>61978933
>Then why are you "all in Link" today?
Because they exited in 2020 but got back in recently.

61979020
>>61978998
so you're baiting?

61979052
>>61979020
You have no shame at all do you?

61979117
can't believe it's been ten years and you faggots still don't understand. Link isn't trying to be digital gold, they're trying to be digital pennies. don't own link and never will until i can buy an apple with one.

61979190
>>61975886
>>10 peels by this ID

bro you got so rattled by a random dude online making for of your dead altcoin that you started tracking his beatoffs

think about that for a sec

fag

61979200
>>61979052
oh look, it's the semantic arguing retard once again, where have you been buddy?
>I cannot comprehend nuances!!!
jeez, it must be tough being such a brainlet kek

61979225
This thread is mostly samefag fudders, isn't it?

61979233
>>61979225
yes yes, le heckin evil fudderinos
so why did you decide to come back?

61979234
>>61979190
lol you're a brown porn addict

61979238
>>61978041
>why would they ever allow the token to accrue value when they can continue siphoning 100% of of the profit indefinitely?
>what company has ever made the decision to make LESS profit?


smart man here
some of you could learn from him


>>61978052
>uncle rico still can't understand that winning the lottery once doesn't mean he'll win again

this post brings up a good point

many of you who bought link back in the day are akin to degenerate gamblers hanging around a horse track. in your head you had some system where you picked out the horse due to specific attributes, and it "worked" for you when you first started gambling

but the years have gone by, and every year you lose a little more. your horse is now consistently losing and you're unable to pick out another winner. despite all evidence to the contrary, "the system still works", you tell yourself, because of that time you hit it big in 2018.

the reality however, is you essentially hit the memecoin lottery, just like so many other altcoin back in those days when there was only a few thousand of them. there's nothing inherently wrong with that, but your misunderstanding of why that happened continues to lose you money

your ego protects you from the realization of course, as it conflicts with the narrative you tell yourself of being a genius investor.

your hubris was your downfall

61979246
>>61979234
>lol

it's not authentic to type that when you're in tears

have you told anyone irl you fight against random dudes who watch porn? what was their reaction? did they ask why you track that or did they try to get away from you really quick bc of how weird it was

61979250
>>61979238
Hubris bros, we are so back.

61979254
>>61979246
>13 peels by this ID
lmao keep jerking adem you little sandnigger gooner fudcuck

61979411
>>61969258
This is like the holocaust for xrpfag

61979738
>>61969992
you're seething tho, keep up unc

61980172
>>61978052
they didn't, the token never accrued value. a ton of people bought the token because it had a good narrative. token price is almost entirely determined by the fantasies people create around them and has nothing to do with any real utility/usecase

61980699
>>61980172
>price is almost entirely determined by the fantasies people create around them and has nothing to do with any real utility/usecase
Like all of crypto

61981186
I don't get how you can all hold Link.
Someone at my work had it, sold at $40 each, made $15.5 mil and quit. Basic wagie job too.

Now? You're under $10, shit, closer to $5 than ever before. When do you think or WHAT do you think will lift you to AT LEAST $20 THIS YEAR?

I'd get in on Link if you could guarantee it'd go above $50. But any and all crypto that isn't BTC seems like shit. ETH and BTC are the only movers, up or down.

Shit, Trump coin went up miraculously and that was a 100% scam!

61981253
>>61981186
I hold LINK because I think it will go up.
What's so hard to understand?

61981257
I OWN FOURTEEN HUNDRED LINK TOKENS

61981212
Nothing ever happens.

61981214
>>61981210
thanks i just deposited more into my bank

61981217
You think she's a good fuck?

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61981218
>>61981212
thats not a phenomenological statement, its a metaphysical

61981225
>>61981210
nah

61981226

61981237
>>61981217
She only let's you deposit reserve fractional loads in her.

61981262
>>61981210
wait, how do you ease further capital requirements when it was at 0% during covid?

61981268
>>61981217
absolutely she has nasty face

61981277
>>61981262
Don't ask this question it collapses an entire contingent of retarded /pol/ doomers entire worldview

61981306
>bank run threats
this is just like in 2020 lol

Nothing happens nigga. If things get really bad the banks will intervene and literally cheat to keep it from happening.

61981312
>>61981217
She looks like a batch and probably bends her back like a stupid resistant foid during doggy

61981333
>>61981306
The collateral to keep the ponzi afloat is gone. The road is gone, the can has fallen off a cliff, the trust is negative. The noose prepared, the mental preparation for bloody revenge internalized.

Let the bloodshed begin, may no banker, no polity, no bureaucrat former as current survive

61981365
>>61981333
>blocks your crash

TOO BIG TO FAIL

61981381
>>61981365
Not too big to be murdered

61981413
ngl I thought unc already had negative credit requirements

61981498
>>61981210
They did this the first week of lockdowns in 2020. Am I missing something?

61981557
>>61981498
Its attempting to signal
>we all under control
>member 2020
>how about buying bags
>you dont want to miss out
>p-please buy bag
But you know that, and your head comes off

61981560
>>61981498

Have you seen that national debt?

61981561
>>61981212
Until it does

61981567
>>61981560
the fed is certainly going to try to sully the sheets and by using up its powder preemptively bait a handful of retards to become exit liquidity. A shirt fart, a dead cat bouncing, and in late Q2/ early Q3 the main event, bankers, state level polity and bureaucrats heads on pikes, with the disembowled corpses of their families littering the streets

no mercy

61981572
>>61981217
She only takes anal because pussy is for her husband only.

61981585
>>61981210
The powers that be have a new system that has been in the development for decades now, ready to be rolled out in the coming years. It will operate in parallel starting sometime this year and by the next decade it will be fully operational as the Agenda 2030 goals are slowly being implemented.
There will be no collapse, no bank run, no violence, no uprising, no world war, no revolution, no killing of jews or politicians or other such fantasies. Instead there will be law & order, compliance and total surveillance until the very end. AI will be at the center of it all.

The Great Reset is inevitable.

61981618
>>61981262
They can lever up deposits even more? Like negative capital

61981623
>>61981217
She looks like she can suck the chrome off a trailer hitch

61981640
>>61981585
LMFAO
The test run was a total failure.
The "system" wont succeed just because propagandist, polity and millenarian geezers demand it.
The explosives and chemical warfare agents to commit a genocide are prepared.

The test run was a mistake, it provided enough time to prepare for the sustainable removal of 20th century artifacts in polity, bureaucracy and subsidized private epistemic communities

Kill yourself now

item.title: WEAT - the play everyone is missing — 69 replies — 25.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
WEAT - the play everyone is missing

Open thread • Replies: 69 • Updated: 2026-03-13 19:47 UTC

OP

This is potentially the most consequential second-order effect from the oil crisis and almost nobody in retail trading is talking about it yet.
Oil and natural gas aren't just fuel — they're the foundational feedstock for nitrogen fertilizer.
The Haber-Bosch process converts natural gas into ammonia, which becomes urea, ammonium nitrate, and other fertilizers.
Roughly 2-3% of global energy consumption goes to fertilizer production alone. When natural gas prices doubled after Russia invaded Ukraine, fertilizer prices tripled and we got a global food price crisis.

Now consider: European natural gas has nearly doubled already in one week. Qatar - one of the world's largest LNG exporters - declared force majeure. 20% of global LNG transits Hormuz. Europe rebuilt its entire energy security strategy around LNG after cutting off Russian gas.

The third-order effect: We're entering spring planting season in the Northern Hemisphere
RIGHT NOW. Farmers make input decisions in March-April. If fertilizer prices spike 50-100% (which is beginning), farmers either plant less, use less fertilizer (lower yields), or absorb costs they can't recover. The food price inflation from this shows up in August-October harvests -
5-6 months from now.

They can release strategic oil reserves. There are no strategic fertilizer reserves. Food prices are about to be fucked, and as you can see from the chart - if you get in early, you can profit. Let retards from Reddit chase oil prices around. Go ahead and wait for them at the finish line.

You’re welcome fuckfaces

Early replies (first 3)

61957829
>>61957787
>This is potentially the most consequential second-orde
stopped reading here. i hate faggots who try to sound smart. judging by your pic, you think wheat is going to pump? youre a fucking retard.

61957846
Ukraine was also a producer of wheat thobeit

61957902
>>61957829
I’m also right. I’m sorry you get all your trading ideas from mouth breathing retards (HURR DURR LETS LONG OIL. HURR DURR LETS BUY HIMS. Wut about muh chainlink!).

Sometimes you might want to try listening to well thought out theories and intelligence for a change. Yes you fucking retard, wheat is going to asplode. But I actually prefer if you stay out; I’d rather someone like you not profit a dime off it

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61971244
>>61957787
Not reading all that gay shit,
Which stock, crypto or commodity and am I long or short?

61971528
>>61969526
damn thanks for pointing that out, I almost ordered some wheat. What a gigantic nigger monkey OP is

61971627
>>61971528
My non crypto portfolio is 20% wheat thanks to OP

61971647
>>61971627
want a medal wheatboy?

61971707
>>61971627
Wheat sounds too autistic not to buy after a beautiful OP. Imagine how ass hurt people would be if you said you got rich off wheat. Peak autism Thanks op

61971748
>>61971647
You may address me as Wheatbaron, nowheater
>>61971707
It won't be Generational wealth, but it's definitely an easy 5x.

61971766
MOS and NTR. Nice comfy leaf fertilizer companies. Lil pump already

61971867
>>61971766
My biggest hold for fertilizer is a nice little company called ASIX. Might pick up some MOS though, elbows up

61972000
i bought wheat and natural gas ETFs (the actual commodities not companies)
rate my financial choice

61972100
>>61957787
I'm buying in, good posts.

61972157
>>61971229
Because they're the ones being choked?
Oh but it's cool, the air they're holding in their lungs is at a premium

61972169
>>61957787
Wheat is stupid, the goyim(cattle) will just switch to other feed like corn.

61972429
>/biz/ confidently falls for 2026 LLM slop
impressive. the future is grim

61973035
>>61972157
yes but, if their current stock is enough for the ongoing season you wont see a rise in wheat price?

61973101
>>61972169
Sneed

61975207
>>61971867
>already up 12% today
Thanks OP, if you didn't post about wheat I'd never of bought this

61976022
>>61971766
Holy shit, nice tickers anon. I got some and am enjoying what looks to be the dual commodity / gamma squeeze going on.

61976029
>>61972429
>redditor refuses to engage in a clearly good trade simply because someone used a obvious high quality LLM to do DD for them.

You should go buy some gamestock anon; I don’t think this trade is for you

61976522
>>61976022
You seem fairly confident in this, can you explain how a retard like myself is meant to profit here? Is it too late?

61976847
>>61976522
>is it too late
Aftermarket hours fertilizer stocks are still pumping. They are outperforming my energy holdings kek. My only regret is not buying more.
Diversify and buy companies that produce petrochemicals/plastics as well.

61976925
>>61957902
I'm with you but I've done nothing but lose money on WEAT. Consider that this won't effect yields until next planting season, as farmers largely already have their fertilizer for this season. Do you think equilibrium cannot be established before then? If not then there are better plays to make. Markets aren't operating rationally given the oil price is still pricing in the war being over tomorrow.

61977020
>>61976925
I guess anons in this thread, along with further research have convinced me to rotate into fertilizer stocks for now - and keep an eye on WEAT because after the fertilizer stocks it’ll pump too

61977928
>>61976522
I don’t know anything man. I’m a retard same as you. But I am glad we have a thread on biz with some actual dirty alpha in it for a change, instead of the retardium that usually goes on here. Listen to the dudes spouting the fertilizer stocks for now - rotate into commodities when it’s clear the pump is on in weeks to months.

$MOS is a clear winner this and next week

61978236
Amazing post OP. I immediately bought a bunch of fertilizer stocks after this post and am up double digit gains. I also bought WEAT and CORN just for shits and giggles

61978269
you guys are dumb. the fertilizer producers have to battle high gas prices as well. all their profits will be eaten up by higher input costs and they will have to eat some of that cost because they never pass it on completely

61979022
Is there like a single grain ETF? I don't want to pick between what and corn

61979260
>>61977020
I bought mos in pre market it then immediately dumped on open. My MIC stocks and mining stocks crab, gold is down again. If everything trends with Nasdaq nothing really matters.

61979278
>>61979022
Invesco's DBA etf is a broader agricultural etf.

61980793
>>61979260
It moved 20% in a few days, you're a tard for not waiting for the profit taking dump.

61981087
>>61978269
What do you think about Wheat?

their demographics and mental/physical health are far worse today than 2 decades ago so i don't understand why so many anons are disappointed at them, as if you hold goycattle to high standards

61964812
>>61954140
The plan is for ISRAEL to dominate the world.
Escalation is necessary and so is mutt blood.

61969335
>>61954140
The thing is, the scenario of Iranians closing down the strait the moment they're backed into a corner has been talked about since forever. Though I suppose after a few major escalations (2020, 12-day war), of which both of them were done under Trump's orders, he thought that Iran wouldn't dare, that they don't have the capability to do such a thing.

61969384
>>61955810

61969494
>>61956133
>Libtards controlled and censored all of social media until Elon bought Twitter.
And now Elon does the same with any opinion that disagrees with him, left or right wing. Just accept that you are a retard.

61971493
>>61954004
Infuriating

61971579

61971592
>>61954140
Iran are not arabs/moors. They have high IQ and know how to deal with the Great Satan with intelligence.

61971605
>>61954039
>>61957437
Umm guys do you know what NATO is? NATO is that thing that forces "eurochads" to join US in every Middle Eastern suicide pact. Did you forget Iraq?

61971620
>>61969335
Iran didn't dare in 2025 but you can only fake peace negotiations while killing everyone doing the negotiations so many times (twice, turns out)

61971631
>>61971605
NATO is totally broken now, burger. And if a european leader even suggested to go die for jews with the US, the ""far"" right would win the elections with a super-majority. They are dumb, but not as dumb as burgers.

61971810
>>61956993
Basically overseas expats should identify as Canadian

61971850
>>61954970
Post image of your keyboard right now.
>It's the Hebrew/English variant

61971852
>>61955310

61971874
>>61955310
Hell is being caught between both parties bullshit

61971906
>>61954970
>geg
Too obvious

61971921
>>61956866
They're just concealing their pedophilia. Dismiss them

61971976
>>61958149
Literally, figuratively, unironically yes, that is precisely what is happening. With Larry Ellison buying ALL (no that is not an exaggeration) of the legacy media (CBS, CNN, HBO, etc.) on behalf of Israel and the massive Israeli disinfo bots on Reddit, here, X, TikTok etc. The absolute lowest common denominator, bottom of the barrel normie legitimately believes "America is winning! War is over1!!!1!!". You have to be, as the YNs say, "Tapped In" in order to know how dire the situation reallly is. The Jewish disinfo bots aren't as bad here on /biz/ as they are on /pol/ and /b/ but they're here. They're the ones spewing bullshit like what you replied to. Luckily the veil keeps lifting as the days go by and the bots can't drown out ALL of the truthful posts from social media, so it becomes quite easy to become "Tapped In.". When the entirety of the media tells you we are winning, but then you go to the gas station for your daily fill-up of your lifted F-350 Super Duty with the double cabin that you bought at 27% APR for 96 months and see the 90 cent overnight price increase, you start to question whether we really are "winning" and that leads you to Google which leads you to the current news of how an American oil tanker was just shot by a missile, very clearly contradicting the "We are winning." narrative. Even the most retarded conservative boomer who bought that truck at those horrible rates can still add 1+1.

61971989
>>61971976
>YNs
what

61972961
>>61954004
Oh look, he saved caps lock for the part where he insults Americans again, instead of just turning it on for the entire post. Thats nice. Fuckin boomers scum.

61973140
>>61971631

Just look at Millei, Orban, Fico, MAGA, and the rest of the clowns. """"Conservatives"""" have been insisting that sucking off Bibi is the real trad way for ages and they're still at it.

61973149

On another note I found a 10k gold ring in my kitchen today.

61974185
>>61954918

item.title: HUGE HOUSING CRASH INCOMING — 26 replies — 20.8/hr
item.content:encoded:
HUGE HOUSING CRASH INCOMING

Open thread • Replies: 26 • Updated: 2026-03-13 21:17 UTC

OP

Early replies (first 3)

61979365
>>61979352
>blocks your path to affording a house

61979377
>>61979352
Not selling. Fuck off.

61979384
>>61979352
Nothing a 50 year mortgage won’t fix

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61979402
>>61979352
Good.
Houses are places to live not an investment.
You want to get money on property, by undeveloped land.

61979407
>>61979365
He blocked the Strait of Home US

61979468
>>61979407
The strait is open you just have to be brave and make a bid over asking price

61979504
Kek I'm looking for a house right now. Kind of had a big short moment with a couple I just saw in a brand new build luxury community in the midwest.

>multiple big nice top end tier houses
>totally unpainted and decorated like shit like some low class squatter is living there
>one is literally some random ghanans that must have arrived here due the biden bust and somehow qualified for a house like this
>the other is some chick who broke up with her boyfriend and can't find anyone to pay the same $500k for it
>both have been on the market for almost a year and are dumping by $10k in price now periodically

61979579
I just want a home brothers. When can I sell like 500 oz of silver for a tiny house or something

61979615
its cause Trump is mass deporting so many people

61979623
the problem is that while rates are too high for non-owners to justify buying houses, people who locked in 1% rates in 2020 have no reason to sell. I don't see a crash coming because there's no incentive to dump the bag, while in 2008 people had variable rate helocs which meant they initially got a low rate which became a high rate when shit got ffucked and forced them to sell.

What's happening is that as long as mortgage rates are high, hoomers will not sell, but people sitting on cash or cash related assets like gold, 401ks, stocks and shit aren't going to buy either- creating cash-poor hoomers and house-poor cash holders.

>>61979365
powell is specifically why houses are unaffordable, trump has continually told him to drop rates.

61979789
>>61979579
best i can do is a 30 year old RV

61979812
>>61979623
Cash-poor hoomers still need money to eat.
House-poor cashers can always rent.

The only way hoomers get something out of this is in the case of inflation. Still, goldchads will do better.

61979825
>>61979352
Zoomers and millenials are not even having many kids. They are never going to buy some Boomer mcmansion with 7 bedrooms and 10 bathrooms at 5x the price what boomers paid for it. Its complete stupidity. The jews are telling us that our jobs are going away and we are being rendered irrelevant by their Artificial intelligence/ robots. So why the fuck is any young couple going to buy your dads or grandads mcmansion for 2 million and lock into a 30 year mortgage when they don't have kids or even know if they will have a job/future in the next 10 years. I hope sincerely that every fucking boomer gets absolutely turbo fucked financially before they take their last breath

61979870
>>61979623
This is why being able to lock in a rate for the entire term of the mortgage is a bad thing. I know a bunch of lucky fucks who locked in very low rates are going to come crying and whining and pissing and shitting at that comment, but it's not healthy for the long term housing market.

61979956
>>61979623
inflation is not even tamed and your solution is to drop interest rates? that's going to create 8% inflation and housing will once again pump. that 400k shitbox is now 550k pending inspection.

61980072
>>61979352
It’s over

61980711
>>61979870
loaner hands type this post

61980958
>>61980711
Why can't you retards understand that there will be times (i.e. now) when housing begins to decline and you will then be better off in a system where mortgage rates are only locked for 5 years and then you get a new lower rate. It becomes hard for housing to depreciate (like any normal asset does) if owners never have any incentive to sell due to being protected by low rates until the end of time. 25 year locked mortgage rates only protect boomer faggots who got in during the low rates and fucks over young home buyers when rates are higher. There is no volume on the market even though people want to sell.

61981015
>>61979956
truflation is at 1.47%

61981091
>>61981015
>truflation
He admitted to being a literal propagandist. He's too much of a coward to even include the price of energy in his calculations now.

61981107
>>61981015
that's been debunked by patriots, real inflation is 0.25%, time to start printing.

61981114
>>61981091

And what, you think it's been 5% per year for decades now? That's why our computers are worth $100k and cars are $1m right? Because that's what that kind of compounding inflation would do

61981298
>>61981114
They haven't stopped printing since they had the power to do so.

61981304
>>61979377
Selling to who?

61981448
>>61979365
>>61979352
>two schizoids cant decide what is the point of the thread
make up your minds

61981468
>>61979352
just lower the prices. I hate boomers so god damn much.
